notes: Fill explicit limits/reset times here when a provider exposes them or when the user wants manual tracking. Null means do not guess.

Codex.notes: Codex local state exposes tokens_used by thread, but account remaining/reset is not exposed locally.

Gemini Vertex.notes: Gemini Vertex local workflow usage is measured from docs/agent-limits/gemini-vertex-usage.jsonl. Actual project/org remaining throughput is managed by Google Cloud and not exposed locally as a simple reset counter.

Claude Code.notes: Claude Code JSONL exposes request usage; subscription remaining/reset is not exposed locally.

Antigravity CLI.notes: Antigravity logs quota refresh events, but no numeric usage/remaining/reset source has been found locally.
